## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.getRuntimeFilling() method

Gets a runtime filling recipe by ID. Implements IConfectionContext interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRuntimeFilling(id: FillingId): Result<IRuntimeFillingRecipe>;
```
